Reduced Inequalities.reason: The course's inclusion of '女性主義' directly addresses gender inequality. 'Ways of Seeing' critically examines power dynamics and social structures, implicitly addressing broader inequalities (Target 10.2).

Responsible Consumption and Production.reason: The core text 'Ways of Seeing' and the topic '流行文化' (Pop culture) critically examine consumerism and image consumption, fostering awareness for sustainable lifestyles (Target 12.8).
